title: More Banner Patterns
description: Adds over 30 new banner patterns to help you decorate your world... and shield!
body:
# More Banner Patterns
This data pack adds **over 30** banner patterns that you can use to decorate your world through the loom!

<details>
<summary>Patterns Obtained Through Items</summary>

### Flower
- Quatrefoil
### Skull
- Ribs
### Thing
- Club
- Diamond
- Heart
- Spade
### Globe
- Crescent
- Mullet (Star)
### Snout
- Bolts
### Flow
- Earth
- Fire
- Water
- Wind

</details>
